title: Enter your email and we'll send you a code to log into your DC SUN Bucks account
logInDisclaimerBody1: You can use the same login you use to access the OSSE Parent Portal. Also, if you don't have an account, you can create one using your email address.
logInDisclaimerBody2: Contact us if you need assistance logging into your account.
body: If you are your child’s primary guardian enter your email to see their DC SUN Bucks information.
verifyTitle: Confirm the code sent to your email
verifyLabelDigit1: Enter first digit of the confirmation code
verifyLabelDigit2: Enter second digit of the confirmation code
verifyLabelDigit3: Enter third digit of the confirmation code
verifyLabelDigit4: Enter fourth digit of the confirmation code
verifyLabelDigit5: Enter fifth digit of the confirmation code
verifyLabelDigit6: Enter sixth digit of the confirmation code
verifyInvalidErrorMessage: Enter a valid [6] digit code. Tap here to send a new code.
emailSubject: Your DC SUN Bucks Login Code
emailBody1: Use this code to log in to your account.
emailBody3: The code will expire in 10 minutes. Do not share this code with anyone.
